$description: Font family stacks. Three roles: IBM Plex Sans for prose/UI, IBM Plex Mono for eyebrows/labels/metadata/nav, JetBrains Mono for code. System fallbacks ensure rendering even before woff2 files are bundled.

label.$description: Eyebrows, nav, metadata, tags, badges — uppercase mono labels. Reserved from code so the code font keeps its own voice.
